answers: Diversity refers to the presence of differences within a group — including race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, disability, sexual orientation, and perspectives.
Diversity holo ekta group e bibhinnota thaka — race, gender, age, religion, culture, ar different viewpoints niye.
Diversity matters because it brings different perspectives, drives innovation, improves decision-making, and creates more inclusive and fair environments.
Promote diversity by actively including underrepresented voices, removing biases from hiring, creating inclusive policies, and celebrating different cultures and backgrounds.
